title: manilkara merrilliana
intro: Manilkara merrilliana, also known as the Philippine madrono, is a species of tropical tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The bark and leaves of the Manilkara merrilliana plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Manilkara merrilliana include the treatment of fever, headache, and digestive issues, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the Manilkara merrilliana plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
